Did you know TOEFL is changing in 2026?

Difficulty Adaptation

Reading and Listening now adjust in difficulty based on your answers.

Updated Writing Tasks

Compose an email, build sentences from mixed up words and write part of an academic conversation.

New Speaking Section

Repeat 7 short sentences to test fluency and pronunciation. Answer 4 open-ended interview-style questions.

Shorter Test Time

The test time is reduced to about 90 minutes.

0%
0 seconds
Context

Walking is a simple way to stay healthy. You do not need any special equipment, just a pair of comfortable shoes. You can walk in a park, on the street, or even inside a big building. Walking helps your heart stay strong.

What is the only thing you need for walking?

Insert this sentence

"It helps remove food and keeps your smile bright."

Where would the following sentence best fit?

Brushing your teeth is important for healthy hygiene. You should brush your teeth at least twice a day. Put toothpaste on your toothbrush. Brush all of your teeth for two minutes. Rinse your mouth with water.
0:00/0:00

[Student]: Excuse me, could you tell me where the library is?

[Teacher]: Of course. Go straight down this hall, then turn left at the cafeteria. The library is the big building on your right.

[Student]: Thank you very much!

What is the student looking for?

Context

The Industrial Revolution marked a major turning point in history; almost every aspect of daily life was influenced in some way. As production methods shifted from hand tools to machinery, goods became cheaper and more accessible. However, this shift also led to rapid urbanization, as people flocked to cities for factory jobs, resulting in overcrowded living conditions and significant sanitation challenges.

What was a direct result of people moving to cities for factory jobs?

Speak for up to 45 seconds

Some people prefer to work in a team, while others prefer to work alone. Which do you prefer and why? Include details and examples in your explanation.

Microphone access denied. You can click "I can't speak" to answer a different question.

Everyone has a favorite food. What is yours?

Context

What is your favorite food? Why do you like it?

How LangArena Works

Skill Tracking

We track 13 specific TOEFL skills across all sections to find your strengths.

Smart Repetition

Mastered a topic? We rotate it out. Struggling? We bring it back.

Adaptive Learning

We update your level in real-time and adjust the program for optimal learning.

Detailed Analytics

Get deep insights into your performance with every question you answer.

Exam Mode

Practice with realistic timing and pressure before your test day.

Your payment is secured

Your subscription will renew at €69.99 every 3 month(s). Cancel anytime.

By subscribing you agree to our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. Your subscription will auto-renew at the regular price after the promo period. Cancel anytime.

FAQ

You will start with a 15 minute diagnostic test of all skills required to pass the TOEFL. This will help determine your weak areas and allow the system to tailor the program to you. As you progress through the program, you will periodically take similar diagnostic tests to see how you are progressing and your score estimate in different sections. At any time, you can also take the full 90 minute test.

The email you use for the purchase will be linked to your account on LangArena.com where you will be able to log in using a code sent to your email address after purchase.

To cancel your subscription, click the Unsubscribe button in your account settings on the website. If you wish to cancel, please do so 24 hours before the renewal date.
